detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文(一) (English(I))	開課班級 : 日大學英文	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 蔡漢民	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
1.Develop students' understanding of the world's cultures. 2. Students will be able to discuss each topic in group and present their viewpoints to the class. 3. Develop students' critical reading and thinking skills. 4. Students will enhance their abilities in reading, grammar, vocabulary, listening and speaking in this class. Basic writing skills will also be involved in this class. 


2.教學綱要
For each unit, there will be:a)preview, in-class, and review activities, b)getting-reading activities to familiarize the students with each topic, b)vocabulary and structure explanation to ensure students' reading fluency, c)activities to develop students critical thinking in group, d)assignments for each unit, and e)TOEIC Test Bank. 


3.教科書
4	書名 : Essential Reading 1　
出版日期 : 2021年 10月 
作者 : Chris Gough　出版社 : Macmillan Publishers　版本 : second edition 


無參考書資料。

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Mid-term exam: 30% Final exam: 30% Class participation: 40% 
Class participation includes attendance, team work and class activity participation. Requirements: 1. Students are required to bring their textbooks to class. 2. All assignments are due on the due date. Late assignments will NOT be accepted. 3. Sleeping is completely PROHIBITED in the class. In this class sleeping means absence from the class. 4. There will be no make-up quizzes or tests. Attendance: Students absent from the class for more than 4 times will get zero in Class Participation, which holds 40% of the total score. 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG3 健康與福祉


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：中
